en.extract:
The green-backed flycatcher (Ficedula elisae) is a bird in the family Muscicapidae, which contains the Old World flycatchers. It was long considered to be a subspecies of the narcissus flycatcher, but morphological and acoustical differences between the two indicate they are instead separate species. It breeds in northeastern China and winters in southeast Asia.
"F. beijingnica", proposed as a separate species called Beijing flycatcher or Peking flycatcher, is now considered by experts to be the first-summer male of this species and thus no longer a valid taxon.

The '''green-backed flycatcher''' ('''''Ficedula elisae''''') is a [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]], which contains the [[Old World]] flycatchers.<ref name = "IUCN"/> It was long considered to be a subspecies of the [[narcissus flycatcher]], but morphological and acoustical differences between the two indicate they are instead separate species.<ref name = "Zhang"/> It breeds in northeastern [[China]] and winters in southeast Asia.<ref name = "IUCN"/>

"''F. beijingnica''", proposed as a separate species called '''Beijing flycatcher''' or '''Peking flycatcher''', is now considered by experts to be the first-summer male of this species and thus no longer a valid taxon.

zh.extract:
綠背姬鶲（學名：Ficedula elisae）是屬於鶲科的一種雀鳥，是姬鶲屬的一種。分佈於中國、馬來西亞、泰國及越南。出沒於林地。體長13厘米。


分类
该物种以前被视为黄眉姬鹟的「东陵亚种」（学名：F. n. elisae），模式产地在河北。该物种是单型物种，没有亚种分化。


形態
上體灰綠色，眼圈皮黃色，眼前有黃色短紋。翼和尾黑色，覆羽和飛羽羽緣有白邊。下體和腰部黃色，嘴和腳黑色。


分布
绿背姬鹟分布于繁殖于中国华北地区及东北地区；迁移至华南、海南和东南亚的泰国、马来亚和越南。


腳註


參考文獻

del Hoyo, J., Collar, N.J., Christie, D.A., Elliott, A., Fishpool, L.D.C., Boesman, P. and Kirwan, G.M. 2016. HBW and BirdLife International Illustrated Checklist of the Birds of the World. Volume 2: Passerines. Lynx Edicions and BirdLife International, Barcelona, Spain and Cambridge, UK.
